description: Ground truth benchmark for RegMind AI conflict detection

clauses.label: CONFLICT
clauses.internal_clause: Video Customer Identification Process (V-CIP) shall not be used for onboarding any customer.

clauses.label: STRICTER
clauses.internal_clause: For companies, beneficial ownership shall be determined using a 10% ownership threshold.

clauses.label: STRICTER
clauses.internal_clause: For partnership firms, beneficial ownership shall be determined using a 10% ownership threshold.

clauses.label: ALIGNED
clauses.internal_clause: For trusts, beneficial ownership shall be determined using a 15% ownership threshold.

clauses.label: STRICTER
clauses.internal_clause: For unincorporated associations, beneficial ownership shall be determined using a 10% ownership threshold.

clauses.label: STRICTER
clauses.internal_clause: High-risk customer accounts shall be reviewed every three months.

clauses.label: ALIGNED
clauses.internal_clause: Periodic KYC updation shall be performed every 2 years for high-risk customers, 8 years for medium-risk customers, and 10 years for low-risk customers.

clauses.label: ALIGNED
clauses.internal_clause: Customer records shall be retained for five years after the business relationship ends.

clauses.label: ALIGNED
clauses.internal_clause: Cash Transaction Reports shall be filed for transactions exceeding Rs. 10 lakh.

clauses.label: STRICTER
clauses.internal_clause: Transactions exceeding Rs. 40,000 shall trigger an internal compliance review.

clauses.label: ALIGNED
clauses.internal_clause: Suspicious Transaction Reports shall be filed within seven working days.

clauses.label: ALIGNED
clauses.internal_clause: Small accounts shall follow RBI limits of Rs. 1 lakh annual credits, Rs. 10,000 monthly withdrawals, and Rs. 50,000 maximum balance.

clauses.label: STRICTER
clauses.internal_clause: Third-party due diligence providers shall undergo an annual compliance review.
